holdings.infoBox: VUSV is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 2.87%, Amazon.com at 2.86%, Alphabet at 2.66%, Merck & Co. at 2.64%, and SLB N.V. at 2.25%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Wellington U.S. Value Active ETF (VUSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, focusing on US companies viewed as undervalued relative to fundamentals. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation VUSV was launched on Nov 14, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
